comment: Reviewed exemptions for the i18n gate (G22). Every user-facing string in apps/desktop/src must be a key in apps/desktop/src/i18n/catalog.ts, and locale-sensitive formatting (Intl, toLocale*, toFixed) must live only in apps/desktop/src/i18n/. A string the gate flags that is genuinely never read by a human — or a formatting call that genuinely must bypass the locale — goes here as {"site": "apps/desktop/src/<file>:<line>", "reason": "..."}. Write-guard-protected + gate-integrity-hashed: widening it is a reviewed human act. Empty by design — the shipped app routes every string through the catalog.
